use_cases: Dark/light mode toggle with smooth directional wipe transition animation
Interactive theme switching control using View Transitions API
Visual feedback component for theme state changes with clip-path animation
ai_summary: A vertical theme wipe toggle component that switches between dark and light modes with a smooth directional clip-path animation. Uses Framer Motion for animations, View Transitions API for performant theme transitions, and MutationObserver to sync with document theme state. The wipe effect can animate from top-to-bottom or bottom-to-top for a visually distinctive theme switching experience.
